description: Engineers must test an aircraft in an anechoic chamber to ensure its electronic systems do not interfere with each other and are not susceptible to external radio frequencies.

nodes.task_description: Power on all of the aircraft's avionics and electronic systems.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms all systems are operational.

nodes.task_description: Use antennas to 'listen' for any unintended radio emissions from the aircraft's systems.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent scans the frequency spectrum and finds no emissions that exceed the specified limits.

nodes.task_description: Transmit high-power radio waves at the aircraft to test its susceptibility, while monitoring the systems for any upsets or faults.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent bombards the aircraft with RF energy and confirms that all systems continue to operate without interruption.
